summary: Full backend (15/15 pytest) and frontend E2E tests passed for Stelle Italian dating app. Auth (register/login/me/logout via cookie + bearer), profile update + persistence, bacheca filters, like-to-match flow with 'Connessione Stellare' modal, matches list, and chat send/receive all verified through the public preview URL.

issues: When filters bar is collapsed/expanded the bottom 'ETA MIN/MAX' labels appear on a dark background and the input outline is barely visible (low contrast). Consider lighter border or label color for accessibility.
Outgoing bubble uses cream/gold background with light text on a dark area – text on the bubble is dark and OK, but no visible message metadata (timestamp). Minor.

action_items: Optional: tighten CORS – server.py uses allow_origins='*' together with allow_credentials=True which browsers reject when origin is wildcard; works only because cookies are forwarded via proxy. Replace with explicit origin from env.
Optional: collection unique index on users.email and user_sessions.session_token to prevent races on duplicate registration / session reuse.
Optional: enrich /api/matches and /api/messages with last-message preview / read state for richer UI.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py (~430 lines) is fine for current scope; if it grows, split into routers (auth.py, users.py, matches.py).
auth/session endpoint stores Google session_token directly as our session token – acceptable, but consider rotating to our own token on login to decouple from Emergent token lifetime.
Frontend uses axios with withCredentials and also Authorization header fallback; backend supports both correctly.
All Mongo queries exclude `_id` and the password_hash field – good.
data-testid coverage is solid on all interactive elements requested in the spec.
test_credentials: Created at runtime via /api/auth/register with unique suffixes (luna_<ts>@stelle.example.com / magicstar123, sole_<ts>@stelle.example.com / magicstar123).
seed_data_creation: Each pytest run creates fresh Luna/Sole/Stranger users with uuid-suffixed emails; no cleanup performed (stateless additions, no impact on production-like data).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is healthy on https://love-portal-pro.preview.emergentagent.com. Use Bearer token from /api/auth/register|login (also returned in JSON) to bypass cookie issues in pytest. Frontend selectors verified: login-submit-btn, register-submit-btn, google-login-btn, profile-{name,age,city,bio,gender,save}, filter-{min-age,max-age,gender,city,interest}, profile-card-{id}, profile-card-like-{id}, match-modal, chat-input, chat-send-btn. Mutual-like flow: pre-create Sole→Luna like via API, then click like on Sole's card from Luna's session to trigger match modal.
